transliteration:
rāga-dveṣa-vimuktais tu viṣayān indriyaiś caran
ātmavaśyair vidheyātmā prasādam adhigacchati
literal_meaning: One who, freed from attraction and aversion, moves among sense-objects with senses controlled by the self, attains serenity.
contextual_meaning: True psychological freedom is not repression but regulated engagement: when the ego’s likes/dislikes are released, the senses serve the higher Self, producing inner calm.
psychological_state: Secure autonomy—actions are guided by values, not impulses; the nervous system shifts from reactive to responsive mode.
trigger_scenario: Scrolling social media without getting hooked by outrage or FOMO, feeling centered rather than depleted.
anchor_text: Let your senses move among pleasures without clutching or rejecting, and peace will settle in.
